utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh my God ! Chandler just left though !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah but , maybe it is not what we think . Maybe it is tell Monica I am sorry I ... drank the last of the milk .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Or maybe he ... he was writing to tell her that ... that he is changed his name , you know ? Tell Monica I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I think it means he freaked out and left !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Do not be so negative ! Good God ! Is not it possible that Sorry is sitting in there right now ? !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . Phoebe , I ... I think Ross is right . What are we gonna do ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look ... Okay , I am just gonna ... I am gonna have to go find him and bring him back !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You ... you make sure Monica does not find out , okay ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I will , I will find him .
